madness_su_0: 1) Amnesia: The investigator wakes in an unfamiliar place with no memory of identity.
madness_su_1: 2) Robbed: The investigator was robbed while incapacitated (Luck roll for treasured possessions).
madness_su_2: 3) Battered: The investigator wakes injured; HP halved (no major wound).
madness_su_3: 4) Violence: A violent rampage; targets and casualties are up to the Keeper.
madness_su_4: 5) Ideology/Beliefs: The investigator acts out a belief in an extreme, delusional way.
madness_su_5: 6) Significant People: The investigator obsessively sought out a Significant Person.
madness_su_6: 7) Institutionalized: The investigator wakes in an asylum or jail cell.
madness_su_7: 8) Flee in Panic: The investigator wakes far away, lost or on a train/bus to nowhere.
madness_su_8: 9) Phobia: The investigator gains a new phobia (roll 1D100 on the phobia table).
madness_su_9: 10) Mania: The investigator gains a new mania (roll 1D100 on the mania table).
